analysis: The project is a static website with a cosmic theme, but the current implementation lacks detailed black hole visuals, animations, and interactive elements. The HTML structure is incomplete, the CSS does not fully support the black hole theme, and the JavaScript functionality is not fully implemented. The website needs enhancements to create a visually immersive and interactive experience focused on black holes.

improvements.description: Complete the HTML structure to include sections for black hole information, interactive animated slides, and a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon.
Enhance the CSS with a full dark, cosmic theme, including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, glowing elements, and Egyptian-themed patterns.
Fix syntax errors, implement the showSlide function, and add functionality for mobile menu toggle, interactive buttons, and animated elements related to black holes.
